videos.title: Learn CSS Transform In 15 Minutes
videos.description: Comprehensive look at the scale function including scaleX, scaleY, scaleZ, and combining scale with other transforms.

videos.title: Really fun CSS hover effects
videos.description: Uses scale and transform-origin extensively to create creative hover effects with pseudo-elements and transitions.

videos.title: A new way to do CSS transforms!
videos.description: Covers the standalone scale property and how it differs from transform: scale() with practical examples.

videos.title: #30 CSS Transform Property - CSS Full Tutorial
videos.description: Explains scale function along with other transform properties for scaling elements in 2D space.
